NVDA.title: Is Arista Networks (ANET) The Best AI Stock to Buy?
NVDA.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) is presented as a strong contender in the AI market, acting as the connectivity backbone for AI infrastructure in data centers. The company shows robust financial performance with high revenue and EPS growth, despite a premium valuation. Its future prospects are tied to the increasing demand for networking solutions as AI workloads shift towards more inference and require more interconnected hardware.

NVDA.title: 4,837 Shares in Intel Corporation $INTC Purchased by Integral Investment Advisors Inc.
NVDA.summary: Integral Investment Advisors Inc. initiated a new position in Intel Corporation, purchasing 4,837 shares valued at approximately $213,000 in the first quarter. This comes as Intel continues to receive bullish analyst ratings, with some price targets raised due to growth expectations in foundry, AI PC, and networking. Despite positive earnings reports and analyst optimism, the stock has experienced recent volatility amidst broader profit-taking in the chip sector and concerns about cooling AI demand.

NVDA.title: Border to Coast Pensions Partnership Ltd Raises Stock Position in Amazon.com, Inc. $AMZN
NVDA.summary: Border to Coast Pensions Partnership Ltd increased its stake in Amazon.com, Inc. by 2.4% in the first quarter, bringing its total holdings to 989,296 shares valued at approximately $206.7 million. Amazon is now the fund's 7th largest position, comprising 3.5% of its portfolio. The article also highlights Amazon's strong first-quarter earnings, new growth drivers including its Leo satellite network and expanded AI efforts, and a positive outlook from Wall Street analysts with a consensus "Buy" rating and a target price of $312.79.

NVDA.title: Netflix Is Down 21% This Year. History Says This Is the Time to Buy.
NVDA.summary: Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) shares are down 21% this year and 42% over the past year, echoing a previous market downturn in 2022. Despite current investor pessimism, historical performance suggests that buying during such dips has rewarded patient investors. The company is innovating with new initiatives like password-sharing crackdowns, ad-supported plans, and partnerships to become a central hub for television, indicating potential for future growth despite competition.

NVDA.title: Microchip Technology Inc. stock underperforms Friday when compared to competitors
NVDA.summary: The article reports that Microchip Technology Inc.'s stock underperformed on Friday compared to its competitors, including NVIDIA Corp. and Intel Corp. Despite the loss, the stock closed above its 52-week low.

NVDA.title: SK Telecom to Build 15GW AI Data Center
NVDA.summary: SK Telecom announced plans to build a 15GW AI data center by 2029 to meet the increasing demand for AI model training and inference. This massive project, estimated at KRW 70 trillion for each 1GW center, aims to establish Korea as a leading AI infrastructure hub in Asia and boost national competitiveness. SK Telecom will finance the initiative through a combination of its own investments, strategic partnerships, and long-term customer contracts, leveraging SK Group's affiliates for an integrated approach to semiconductors, energy solutions, and data center operations.

NVDA.title: SK Telecom to Build 15GW AI Data Center Infrastructure
NVDA.summary: SK Telecom announced plans to construct a 15GW AI data center by 2029, starting with a 5GW phase, to address the surging demand for AI computing and bolster Korea's leadership in AI infrastructure. This massive investment, estimated at KRW 70 trillion per 1GW center, will be financed through SK Telecom's own funds, strategic partnerships, and long-term customer contracts. The project aims to integrate SK Group's expertise across semiconductors, energy, and data center construction while promoting regional development.

NVDA.title: Corning stock drops 11% in post-rally trade as AI fiber hopes hit test
NVDA.summary: Corning's stock dropped 10.81% on Thursday, closing at $196.79, as investors evaluate its "AI-infrastructure story" following a significant rally this year. Despite the recent dip, shares are still up over 100% in 2026, driven by expectations of increased fiber demand from AI data centers. The company has secured major deals with NVIDIA and Amazon and is expanding its manufacturing capacity, but its valuation faces scrutiny after the recent price correction and mixed analyst views.

MSFT.title: Intuit Inc. $INTU Shares Sold by FUKOKU MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE Co
MSFT.summary: FUKOKU MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE Co significantly reduced its stake in Intuit Inc. (INTU) by 87% in the first quarter, selling 6,000 shares and retaining 896 shares valued at approximately $387,000. Despite this, analyst sentiment remains largely positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $498.40. Intuit recently reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.20 per share.

MSFT.title: Hudson Edge Investment Partners Inc. Sells 8,360 Shares of EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG
MSFT.summary: Hudson Edge Investment Partners Inc. reduced its stake in EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) by 12.6% in the first quarter, selling 8,360 shares and retaining 58,110 shares valued at approximately $8.4 million. This reduction comes as EOG Resources reported stronger-than-expected quarterly earnings and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.02 per share, indicating a 3.1% annualized yield. Despite this institutional selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for EOG, with an average target price of $155.25.

MSFT.title: Elevation Point Wealth Partners LLC Buys Shares of 22,726 Vistra Corp. $VST
MSFT.summary: Elevation Point Wealth Partners LLC acquired 22,726 shares of Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) during the first quarter, valued at approximately $3.42 million. Several other hedge funds also adjusted their positions in Vistra, collectively representing 90.88% institutional ownership. Analysts have a consensus "Buy" rating for Vistra with a target price of $230.31, while company insiders have recently sold shares.

MSFT.title: The Invesco QQQ ETF - Classic NASDAQ-100 exposure for US growth investors
MSFT.summary: The Invesco QQQ ETF offers US growth investors concentrated access to 100 non-financial companies on the Nasdaq-100 Index. It is widely used for broad growth exposure, particularly in large-cap technology, communication services, and consumer discretionary sectors. While highly liquid and accessible, investors should note its sector concentration and market-cap weighting.

MSFT.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Elastic (ESTC) Launching Unified Prometheus-Powered Observability And Migration Tools
MSFT.summary: Elastic N.V. (ESTC) recently launched new unified observability capabilities, including native Prometheus support and migration tools, which aim to consolidate data for enterprises. This move aligns with Elastic's strategy to position itself as a single backend for logs, metrics, and traces, reinforcing its investment narrative around unified search, observability, and security. Despite potential challenges like competition and operational adjustments from recent workforce reductions, analysts provide varied forecasts, with some predicting significant revenue growth and a higher fair value for the company.

MSFT.title: Cencora (COR) Could Be 15% Undervalued As Earnings Date Nears
MSFT.summary: Cencora (COR) is approaching its fiscal third-quarter earnings release on August 5, 2026, with current analysis suggesting it might be undervalued by 15.4%. The company's stock has shown strong long-term performance, and its investments in digital infrastructure are expected to drive higher margins and operating income. However, potential risks include increased regulatory scrutiny on drug pricing and heightened competition in specialty distribution.

MSFT.title: SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF (SPYM) assets up as it joins Trump Accounts debut
MSFT.summary: The SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF (SPYM) has seen a significant increase in assets, primarily due to its selection as the default ETF for the new Trump Accounts savings plan. The fund's assets under management climbed by $35.77 billion since March 31, with more than half of this growth attributed to new inflows rather than just NAV gains. This development is expected to continue driving flows into SPYM, especially as initial contributions to Trump Accounts are directed solely towards this low-cost S&P 500 ETF.

GOOGL.title: Baer Investment Advisory LLC Reduces Stock Holdings in Intuit Inc. $INTU
GOOGL.summary: Baer Investment Advisory LLC decreased its stake in Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) by 72.2% in the first quarter, now holding 2,029 shares valued at $877,000. This reduction comes despite Intuit reporting strong quarterly results with EPS of $12.80 and revenue of $8.56 billion, exceeding analyst expectations. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.20 per share and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, although several firms have recently lowered their price targets.

GOOGL.title: PepsiCo Stock’s 4.1% Yield Comes With a Payout Ratio Question Worth Asking
GOOGL.summary: PepsiCo (PEP) affirmed its full-year guidance in Q1 2026 despite inflation concerns from the Iran conflict, with organic revenue up 3% and core EPS climbing 9%. While the quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share remains unchanged, the payout ratio, which peaked at 147.35% in June, has decreased to 84.49% as of March 2026. TIKR's mid-case model projects PepsiCo stock to reach $202 by December 2030, representing a 40% total return or 8% annualized, dependent on continued earnings recovery and effective cost mitigation.

GOOGL.title: Lansforsakringar Fondforvaltning AB publ Invests $2.85 Million in IonQ, Inc. $IONQ
GOOGL.summary: Lansforsakringar Fondforvaltning AB publ has invested $2.85 million in IonQ, Inc. by purchasing 98,702 shares in the first quarter of 2026. This move highlights growing institutional interest in IonQ, with 41.42% of its stock now held by institutional investors, despite some analyst concerns regarding valuation and insider selling. The company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts with an average price target of $69.88, reflecting a positive long-term outlook for its quantum computing advancements.
